title: Ben 10 Dynamite Datapack!
description: Have you ever dreamed of getting a space device that would transform you into a scary alien? Then this data pack is for you.
body:
Have you ever dreamed of getting a space device that would transform you into a scary alien? Then this data pack is for you.

# Omnitrix
A device that turns you into an alien. To obtain it, you need 15 xp levels and wander through the forest. Suddenly, you'll hear a strange sound - it's a comet, which appears only once per world.

To activate the Omnitrix, go to slot 9 on the hotbar and right-click. You can also select with the right-click button, and to transform, hold down Shift and right-click again.

# Aliens
Each alien has 5 levels of upgrades. To gain experience, you simply need to play as the alien. The more levels you reach, the longer it takes to reach the next level.

<details>
<summary>Four Arms</summary>

A big red dude with four arms.

+Ground Smash (Used by RMB | CD 20s) [​LVL 1]

+Jump (Used by Shift + Look Down, then jump) [​LVL 2]

+Grab Entity (Used by Shift + F | When grab: RMB to Throw / Shift + RMB to Put Down | CD 10s) [​LVL 3]

+Climb (Used by Shift + Look Up) [​LVL 4]

+Sonic Clap (Used by F | CD 10s) [​LVL 5]

</details>

<details>
<summary>Heatblast</summary>

An alien made entirely of magma with stone armor on it.

+Fire Blast (Used by RMB | CD 1s) [​LVL 1]

+Fire Beam (Used by Shift + RMB | CD 10s) [​LVL 2]

+Fire Jump (Used by Shift + Jump in Air) [​LVL 3]+ Fire Absorb (Used by F) [​LVL 4]

+Super Nova (Used by Shift + F | CD 20s) [​LVL 5]

~Remelting (Used by Shift) [​LVL 4]

~If you stand in the fire, it will start to get saturated with it.

-If you touch the water, the Heatblast will go out. In this state, abilities are unavailable, and you have to wait to get them back. You can step into the fire to speed it up.

</details>

# Commands
- /function ben10:items/omnitrix/give - to get the omnitrix
- /function ben10:items/comet/summon - to summon comet

**The more issues are released, the more content there will be!**
